name: Sandtortchen (Sand Tarts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and butter.
2. Beat in 2 eggs.
3. Gradually blend in the flour.
4. Chill dough overnight.
5. Roll dough as thin as possible on a well-floured board.
6. Work with 1/4 of the dough at a time, keeping the remaining dough chilled.
7. Cut into diamonds using a knife.
8. Place cookies on greased cookie sheets.
9. Brush each cookie with beaten egg white.
10. Sprinkle with sugar and a pinch of cinnamon.
11. Place a pecan half in the center of each cookie.
12. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until edges are light brown.
13. Cool on cookie sheets for 1 minute, then transfer to wire racks.
14. Store in airtight tins.
